tEn: A Distributional Perspective on Reinforcement Learning
sEn: Modeling the full distribution of returns, not just the expected value, improves reinforcement learning performance.
sZh: 建模回报的完整分布而非仅期望值，能提升强化学习性能。
absEn: In this paper we argue for the fundamental importance of the value distribution: the distribution of the random return received by a reinforcement learning agent. This is in contrast to the common approach to reinforcement learning which models the expectation of this return, or value. Although there is an established body of literature studying the value distribution, thus far it has always been used for a specific purpose such as implementing risk-aware behaviour. We begin with theoretical results in both the policy evaluation and control settings, exposing a significant distributional instability in the latter. We then use the distributional perspective to design a new algorithm which applies Bellman's equation to the learning of approximate value distributions. We evaluate our algorithm using the suite of games from the Arcade Learning Environment. We obtain both state-of-the-art results and anecdotal evidence demonstrating the importance of the value distribution in approximate reinforcement learning. Finally, we combine theoretical and empirical evidence to highlight the ways in which the value distribution impacts learning in the approximate setting.
absZh: 本文论证了价值分布（强化学习智能体获得的随机回报的分布）的根本重要性，这与通常只建模回报期望（即价值）的强化学习方法形成对比。尽管已有文献研究价值分布，但此前它总是用于特定目的，如实现风险感知行为。我们从策略评估和控制设置的理论结果开始，揭示了后者中显著的分布不稳定性。然后利用分布视角设计了一种新算法，将贝尔曼方程应用于近似价值分布的学习。我们使用街机学习环境中的游戏套件评估了该算法，获得了最先进的结果和轶事证据，证明了价值分布在近似强化学习中的重要性。最后，我们结合理论和实证证据，强调了价值分布在近似设置中影响学习的方式。

contrib.en: Argues for the fundamental importance of the value distribution in reinforcement learning.
contrib.zh: 论证了价值分布在强化学习中的根本重要性。

contrib.en: Proves the distributional Bellman operator is a contraction in the Wasserstein metric for policy evaluation.
contrib.zh: 证明了分布贝尔曼算子在策略评估的Wasserstein度量下是压缩映射。

contrib.en: Identifies instability in the distributional Bellman optimality operator for control.
contrib.zh: 识别了控制设置中分布贝尔曼最优算子的不稳定性。

contrib.en: Introduces Categorical DQN, a new algorithm learning approximate value distributions.
contrib.zh: 提出了Categorical DQN，一种学习近似价值分布的新算法。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on Atari 2600 games, outperforming DQN and other baselines.
contrib.zh: 在Atari 2600游戏上取得了最先进的结果，优于DQN和其他基线。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical and empirical evidence that value distributions improve approximate reinforcement learning.
contrib.zh: 提供了理论和经验证据，表明价值分布改进了近似强化学习。

limits.en: Theoretical results assume bounded moments and finite action spaces.
limits.zh: 理论结果假设有界矩和有限动作空间。

limits.en: Empirical evaluation limited to Atari 2600 games; generalizability to other domains is unverified.
limits.zh: 经验评估仅限于Atari 2600游戏；对其他领域的泛化性未验证。

limits.en: Categorical DQN requires careful tuning of support bounds and number of atoms.
limits.zh: Categorical DQN需要仔细调整支持范围和原子数量。

limits.en: The distributional optimality operator may not converge to a fixed point in control settings.
limits.zh: 分布最优算子在控制设置中可能不收敛到不动点。

limits.en: Algorithm performance depends on the choice of projection and loss function.
limits.zh: 算法性能依赖于投影和损失函数的选择。

items.en: In this paper we argue for the fundamental importance of the value distribution: the distribution of the random return received by a reinforcement learning agent. This is in contrast to the common approach to reinforcement learning which models the expectation of this return, or value. Although there is an established body of literature studying the value distribution, thus far it has always been used for a specific purpose such as implementing risk-aware behaviour. We begin with theoretical results in both the policy evaluation and control settings, exposing a significant distributional instability in the latter. We then use the distributional perspective to design a new algorithm which applies Bellman’s equation to the learning of approximate value distributions. We evaluate our algorithm using the suite of games from the Arcade Learning Environment. We obtain both state-of-the-art results and anecdotal evidence demonstrating the importance of the value distribution in approximate reinforcement learning. Finally, we combine theoretical and empirical evidence to highlight the ways in which the value distribution impacts learning in the approximate setting.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们主张价值分布的根本重要性：即强化学习智能体所获得的随机回报的分布。这与常见的强化学习方法形成对比，后者建模的是这种回报的期望（即价值）。尽管已有大量文献研究价值分布，但迄今为止它总是被用于特定目的，例如实现风险感知行为。我们首先在策略评估和控制设置中给出理论结果，揭示了后者中存在显著的分布不稳定性。然后，我们利用分布视角设计了一种新算法，该算法将贝尔曼方程应用于近似价值分布的学习。我们使用街机学习环境中的游戏套件评估了我们的算法。我们获得了最先进的结果以及轶事证据，证明了价值分布在近似强化学习中的重要性。最后，我们结合理论和经验证据，强调了价值分布在近似设置中影响学习的方式。

items.en: One of the major tenets of reinforcement learning states that, when not otherwise constrained in its behaviour, an agent should aim to maximize its expected utility Q𝑄Q, or value (Sutton & Barto, 1998). Bellman’s equation succintly describes this value in terms of the expected reward and expected outcome of the random transition (x,a)→(X′,A′)→𝑥𝑎superscript𝑋′superscript𝐴′(x,a)\to(X^{\prime},A^{\prime}):
items.zh: 强化学习的主要原则之一指出，当智能体的行为没有其他约束时，它应该旨在最大化其期望效用 Q（即价值）（Sutton & Barto, 1998）。贝尔曼方程简洁地描述了这一价值，它由期望奖励和随机转移 (x,a)→(X',A') 的期望结果组成：

items.en: In this paper, we aim to go beyond the notion of value and argue in favour of a distributional perspective on reinforcement learning. Specifically, the main object of our study is the random return Z𝑍Z whose expectation is the value Q𝑄Q. This random return is also described by a recursive equation, but one of a distributional nature:
items.zh: 在本文中，我们旨在超越价值的概念，主张强化学习的分布视角。具体来说，我们研究的主要对象是随机回报 Z，其期望即为价值 Q。这个随机回报也由一个递归方程描述，但这是一个分布性质的方程：

items.en: The distributional Bellman equation states that the distribution of Z𝑍Z is characterized by the interaction of three random variables: the reward R𝑅R, the next state-action (X′,A′)superscript𝑋′superscript𝐴′(X^{\prime},A^{\prime}), and its random return Z​(X′,A′)𝑍superscript𝑋′superscript𝐴′Z(X^{\prime},A^{\prime}). By analogy with the well-known case, we call this quantity the value distribution.
items.zh: 分布贝尔曼方程指出，Z 的分布由三个随机变量的相互作用决定：奖励 R、下一个状态-动作对 (X',A') 及其随机回报 Z(X',A')。与众所周知的情况类比，我们将这个量称为价值分布。

items.en: Although the distributional perspective is almost as old as Bellman’s equation itself (Jaquette, 1973; Sobel, 1982; White, 1988), in reinforcement learning it has thus far been subordinated to specific purposes: to model parametric uncertainty (Dearden et al., 1998), to design risk-sensitive algorithms (Morimura et al., 2010b, a), or for theoretical analysis (Azar et al., 2012; Lattimore & Hutter, 2012). By contrast, we believe the value distribution has a central role to play in reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 尽管分布视角几乎与贝尔曼方程本身一样古老（Jaquette, 1973; Sobel, 1982; White, 1988），但在强化学习中，它迄今为止一直从属于特定目的：用于建模参数不确定性（Dearden et al., 1998）、设计风险敏感算法（Morimura et al., 2010b, a）或进行理论分析（Azar et al., 2012; Lattimore & Hutter, 2012）。相比之下，我们认为价值分布在强化学习中应发挥核心作用。

items.en: Contraction of the policy evaluation Bellman operator. Basing ourselves on results by Rösler (1992) we show that, for a fixed policy, the Bellman operator over value distributions is a contraction in a maximal form of the Wasserstein (also called Kantorovich or Mallows) metric. Our particular choice of metric matters: the same operator is not a contraction in total variation, Kullback-Leibler divergence, or Kolmogorov distance.
items.zh: 策略评估贝尔曼算子的压缩性。基于 Rösler (1992) 的结果，我们证明，对于固定策略，价值分布上的贝尔曼算子在 Wasserstein（也称为 Kantorovich 或 Mallows）度量的最大形式下是压缩的。我们选择的特定度量很重要：同一算子在总变差、KL 散度或 Kolmogorov 距离下不是压缩的。

items.en: Instability in the control setting. We will demonstrate an instability in the distributional version of Bellman’s optimality equation, in contrast to the policy evaluation case. Specifically, although the optimality operator is a contraction in expected value (matching the usual optimality result), it is not a contraction in any metric over distributions. These results provide evidence in favour of learning algorithms that model the effects of nonstationary policies.
items.zh: 控制设置中的不稳定性。我们将证明贝尔曼最优性方程的分布版本中存在不稳定性，这与策略评估情况形成对比。具体来说，尽管最优性算子在期望值上是压缩的（与通常的最优性结果一致），但在任何分布度量上它都不是压缩的。这些结果为学习算法建模非平稳策略的影响提供了证据。

items.en: Better approximations. From an algorithmic standpoint, there are many benefits to learning an approximate distribution rather than its approximate expectation. The distributional Bellman operator preserves multimodality in value distributions, which we believe leads to more stable learning. Approximating the full distribution also mitigates the effects of learning from a nonstationary policy. As a whole, we argue that this approach makes approximate reinforcement learning significantly better behaved.
items.zh: 更好的近似。从算法的角度来看，学习近似分布而不是其近似期望有许多好处。分布贝尔曼算子保留了价值分布中的多模态性，我们认为这会导致更稳定的学习。近似完整分布也减轻了从非平稳策略学习的影响。总的来说，我们认为这种方法使近似强化学习的行为显著改善。

items.en: We will illustrate the practical benefits of the distributional perspective in the context of the Arcade Learning Environment (Bellemare et al., 2013). By modelling the value distribution within a DQN agent (Mnih et al., 2015), we obtain considerably increased performance across the gamut of benchmark Atari 2600 games, and in fact achieve state-of-the-art performance on a number of games. Our results echo those of Veness et al. (2015), who obtained extremely fast learning by predicting Monte Carlo returns.
items.zh: 我们将在街机学习环境（Bellemare et al., 2013）的背景下说明分布视角的实际好处。通过在 DQN 智能体（Mnih et al., 2015）中对价值分布进行建模，我们在 Atari 2600 基准游戏的全套游戏中获得了显著提升的性能，实际上在许多游戏中达到了最先进的性能。我们的结果与 Veness et al. (2015) 的结果相呼应，他们通过预测蒙特卡洛回报获得了极快的学习速度。

items.en: From a supervised learning perspective, learning the full value distribution might seem obvious: why restrict ourselves to the mean? The main distinction, of course, is that in our setting there are no given targets. Instead, we use Bellman’s equation to make the learning process tractable; we must, as Sutton & Barto (1998) put it, “learn a guess from a guess”. It is our belief that this guesswork ultimately carries more benefits than costs.
items.zh: 从监督学习的角度来看，学习完整的价值分布似乎是显而易见的：为什么要把自己限制在均值上？主要的区别当然在于，在我们的设置中没有给定的目标。相反，我们使用贝尔曼方程使学习过程易于处理；正如 Sutton & Barto (1998) 所说，我们必须“从一个猜测中学习另一个猜测”。我们相信，这种猜测工作最终带来的好处多于代价。

items.en: We consider an agent interacting with an environment in the standard fashion: at each step, the agent selects an action based on its current state, to which the environment responds with a reward and the next state. We model this interaction as a time-homogeneous Markov Decision Process (𝒳,𝒜,R,P,γ)𝒳𝒜𝑅𝑃𝛾(\mathcal{X},\mathcal{A},R,P,\gamma). As usual, 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} and 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A} are respectively the state and action spaces, P𝑃P is the transition kernel P(⋅|x,a)P(\cdot\,|\,x,a), γ∈[0,1]𝛾01\gamma\in[0,1] is the discount factor, and R𝑅R is the reward function, which in this work we explicitly treat as a random variable. A stationary policy π𝜋\pi maps each state x∈𝒳𝑥𝒳x\in\mathcal{X} to a probability distribution over the action space 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A}.
items.zh: 我们考虑一个智能体以标准方式与环境交互：每一步，智能体根据当前状态选择一个动作，环境以奖励和下一个状态作为响应。我们将这种交互建模为时间齐次的马尔可夫决策过程 (X, A, R, P, γ)。通常，X 和 A 分别是状态空间和动作空间，P 是转移核 P(·|x,a)，γ∈[0,1] 是折扣因子，R 是奖励函数，在本文中我们明确将其视为随机变量。一个平稳策略 π 将每个状态 x∈X 映射到动作空间 A 上的一个概率分布。

In particular they are both contraction mappings, and their repeated application to some initial Q0subscript𝑄0Q_{0} converges exponentially to Qπsuperscript𝑄𝜋Q^{\pi} or Q∗superscript𝑄Q^{*}, respectively (Bertsekas & Tsitsiklis, 1996).

items.en: In this paper we take away the expectations inside Bellman’s equations and consider instead the full distribution of the random variable Zπsuperscript𝑍𝜋Z^{\pi}. From here on, we will view Zπsuperscript𝑍𝜋Z^{\pi} as a mapping from state-action pairs to distributions over returns, and call it the value distribution.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们去掉了贝尔曼方程中的期望，转而考虑随机变量 Z^π 的完整分布。从现在开始，我们将 Z^π 视为从状态-动作对到回报分布的映射，并称之为价值分布。

items.en: Our first aim is to gain an understanding of the theoretical behaviour of the distributional analogues of the Bellman operators, in particular in the less well-understood control setting. The reader strictly interested in the algorithmic contribution may choose to skip this section.
items.zh: 我们的首要目标是理解贝尔曼算子的分布模拟的理论行为，特别是在理解较少的控制设置中。纯粹对算法贡献感兴趣的读者可以选择跳过本节。

Without loss of generality, the reader can understand the two sides of a distributional equation as relating the distributions of two independent random variables. Distributional equations have been used in reinforcement learning by Engel et al. (2005); Morimura et al. (2010a) among others, and in operations research by White (1988).

items.en: Thus far we have considered a fixed policy π𝜋\pi, and studied the behaviour of its associated operator 𝒯πsuperscript𝒯𝜋\mathcal{T}^{\pi}. We now set out to understand the distributional operators of the control setting – where we seek a policy π𝜋\pi that maximizes value – and the corresponding notion of an optimal value distribution. As with the optimal value function, this notion is intimately tied to that of an optimal policy. However, while all optimal policies attain the same value Q∗superscript𝑄Q^{*}, in our case a difficulty arises: in general there are many optimal value distributions.
items.zh: 到目前为止，我们考虑了固定策略 π，并研究了其关联算子 \mathcal{T}^{\pi} 的行为。现在我们着手理解控制设置的分布算子——我们寻求最大化价值的策略 π——以及最优价值分布的相应概念。与最优价值函数一样，这一概念与最优策略的概念紧密相关。然而，虽然所有最优策略都达到相同的价值 Q^*，但在我们的情况下出现了一个困难：通常存在许多最优价值分布。

items.en: In this section we show that the distributional analogue of the Bellman optimality operator converges, in a weak sense, to the set of optimal value distributions. However, this operator is not a contraction in any metric between distributions, and is in general much more temperamental than the policy evaluation operators. We believe the convergence issues we outline here are a symptom of the inherent instability of greedy updates, as highlighted by e.g. Tsitsiklis (2002) and most recently Harutyunyan et al. (2016).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示贝尔曼最优性算子的分布类比在弱意义上收敛到最优价值分布的集合。然而，该算子在任何分布度量下都不是压缩映射，并且通常比策略评估算子更不稳定。我们认为这里概述的收敛问题是贪婪更新固有不稳定性的表现，如 Tsitsiklis (2002) 和最近的 Harutyunyan et al. (2016) 所强调的。

items.en: Theorem 1 paints a rather bleak picture of the control setting. It remains to be seen whether the dynamical eccentricies highlighted here actually arise in practice. One open question is whether theoretically more stable behaviour can be derived using stochastic policies, for example from conservative policy iteration (Kakade & Langford, 2002).
items.zh: 定理 1 描绘了控制设置中相当黯淡的图景。这里强调的动态异常是否在实际中出现仍有待观察。一个开放的问题是，是否可以使用随机策略（例如来自保守策略迭代（Kakade & Langford, 2002））推导出理论上更稳定的行为。

items.en: In this section we propose an algorithm based on the distributional Bellman optimality operator. In particular, this will require choosing an approximating distribution. Although the Gaussian case has previously been considered (Morimura et al., 2010a; Tamar et al., 2016), to the best of our knowledge we are the first to use a rich class of parametric distributions.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们提出一种基于分布贝尔曼最优性算子的算法。特别地，这将需要选择一个近似分布。虽然高斯情况已被考虑（Morimura et al., 2010a; Tamar et al., 2016），但据我们所知，我们是第一个使用丰富类别的参数分布。

items.en: We will model the value distribution using a discrete distribution parametrized by N∈ℕ𝑁ℕN\in\mathbb{N} and Vmin,Vmax∈ℝsubscript𝑉minsubscript𝑉maxℝV_{\textsc{min}},V_{\textsc{max}}\in\mathbb{R}, and whose support is the set of atoms {zi=Vmin+i​△​z:0≤i<N}conditional-setsubscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑉min𝑖△𝑧0𝑖𝑁\{z_{i}=V_{\textsc{min}}+i\triangle z:0\leq i<N\}, △​z:=Vmax−VminN−1assign△𝑧subscript𝑉maxsubscript𝑉min𝑁1\triangle z:=\tfrac{V_{\textsc{max}}-V_{\textsc{min}}}{N-1}. In a sense, these atoms are the “canonical returns” of our distribution. The atom probabilities are given by a parametric model θ:𝒳×𝒜→ℝN:𝜃→𝒳𝒜superscriptℝ𝑁\theta:\mathcal{X}\times\mathcal{A}\to\mathbb{R}^{N}
items.zh: 我们将使用由 N ∈ ℕ 和 V_min, V_max ∈ ℝ 参数化的离散分布来建模价值分布，其支撑集是原子集合 {z_i = V_min + i△z : 0 ≤ i < N}，△z := (V_max - V_min)/(N-1)。在某种意义上，这些原子是我们分布的“规范回报”。原子概率由参数模型 θ: 𝒳 × 𝒜 → ℝ^N 给出。

items.en: The discrete distribution has the advantages of being highly expressive and computationally friendly (see e.g. Van den Oord et al., 2016).
items.zh: 离散分布具有高度表达性和计算友好的优点（例如参见 Van den Oord et al., 2016）。

items.en: Using a discrete distribution poses a problem: the Bellman update 𝒯​Zθ𝒯subscript𝑍𝜃\mathcal{T}Z_{\theta} and our parametrization Zθsubscript𝑍𝜃Z_{\theta} almost always have disjoint supports. From the analysis of Section 3 it would seem natural to minimize the Wasserstein metric (viewed as a loss) between 𝒯​Zθ𝒯subscript𝑍𝜃\mathcal{T}Z_{\theta} and Zθsubscript𝑍𝜃Z_{\theta}, which is also conveniently robust to discrepancies in support. However, a second issue prevents this: in practice we are typically restricted to learning from sample transitions, which is not possible under the Wasserstein loss (see Prop. 5 and toy results in the appendix).
items.zh: 使用离散分布带来了一个问题：贝尔曼更新 𝒯Z_θ 和我们的参数化 Z_θ 几乎总是具有不相交的支撑集。从第 3 节的分析来看，最小化 𝒯Z_θ 和 Z_θ 之间的 Wasserstein 度量（视为损失）似乎是自然的，该度量对支撑集的不匹配也具有鲁棒性。然而，第二个问题阻止了这一点：在实践中，我们通常受限于从样本转移中学习，这在 Wasserstein 损失下是不可能的（见命题 5 和附录中的玩具结果）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Categorical DQN: Varying number of atoms in the discrete distribution. Scores are moving averages over 5 million frames.
items.capZh: 图 3：分类 DQN：离散分布中不同数量的原子。分数是 500 万帧上的移动平均。

items.en: To understand the approach in a complex setting, we applied the categorical algorithm to games from the Arcade Learning Environment (ALE; Bellemare et al., 2013). While the ALE is deterministic, stochasticity does occur in a number of guises: 1) from state aliasing, 2) learning from a nonstationary policy, and 3) from approximation errors. We used five training games (Fig 3) and 52 testing games.
items.zh: 为了在复杂环境中理解该方法，我们将分类算法应用于街机学习环境（ALE；Bellemare 等人，2013）中的游戏。虽然 ALE 是确定性的，但随机性仍以多种形式出现：1）状态混叠，2）从非平稳策略中学习，3）近似误差。我们使用了五个训练游戏（图 3）和 52 个测试游戏。

items.en: For our study, we use the DQN architecture (Mnih et al., 2015), but output the atom probabilities pi​(x,a)subscript𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑎p_{i}(x,a) instead of action-values, and chose Vmax=−Vmin=10subscript𝑉maxsubscript𝑉min10V_{\textsc{max}}=-V_{\textsc{min}}=10 from preliminary experiments over the training games. We call the resulting architecture Categorical DQN. We replace the squared loss (r+γ​Q​(x′,π​(x′))−Q​(x,a))2superscript𝑟𝛾𝑄superscript𝑥′𝜋superscript𝑥′𝑄𝑥𝑎2(r+\gamma Q(x^{\prime},\pi(x^{\prime}))-Q(x,a))^{2} by ℒx,a​(θ)subscriptℒ𝑥𝑎𝜃\mathcal{L}_{x,a}(\theta) and train the network to minimize this loss.222For N=51𝑁51N=51, our TensorFlow implementation trains at roughly 75% of DQN’s speed. As in DQN, we use a simple ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-greedy policy over the expected action-values; we leave as future work the many ways in which an agent could select actions on the basis of the full distribution. The rest of our training regime matches Mnih et al.’s, including the use of a target network for θ~~𝜃\tilde{\theta}.
items.zh: 在我们的研究中，我们使用 DQN 架构（Mnih 等人，2015），但输出原子概率 pi(x,a) 而非动作值，并根据训练游戏的初步实验选择 Vmax=-Vmin=10。我们将得到的架构称为分类 DQN。我们将平方损失 (r+γQ(x',π(x'))-Q(x,a))^2 替换为 Lx,a(θ)，并训练网络以最小化该损失。222对于 N=51，我们的 TensorFlow 实现训练速度约为 DQN 的 75%。与 DQN 一样，我们在期望动作值上使用简单的 ε-贪婪策略；将基于完整分布选择动作的多种方式留作未来工作。训练方案的其他部分与 Mnih 等人的一致，包括使用目标网络处理 θ~。

items.en: One surprising fact is that the distributions are not concentrated on one or two values, in spite of the ALE’s determinism, but are often close to Gaussians. We believe this is due to our discretizing the diffusion process induced by γ𝛾\gamma.
items.zh: 一个令人惊讶的事实是，尽管 ALE 具有确定性，但分布并不集中于一两个值，而是通常接近高斯分布。我们认为这是由于我们对 γ 引起的扩散过程进行了离散化。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Learned value distribution during an episode of Space Invaders. Different actions are shaded different colours. Returns below 0 (which do not occur in Space Invaders) are not shown here as the agent assigns virtually no probability to them.
items.capZh: 图 4：Space Invaders 一局游戏中学到的价值分布。不同动作以不同颜色着色。低于 0 的回报（在 Space Invaders 中不会出现）未在此显示，因为智能体几乎不为其分配概率。

items.en: We began by studying our algorithm’s performance on the training games in relation to the number of atoms (Figure 3). For this experiment, we set ϵ=0.05italic-ϵ0.05\epsilon=0.05. From the data, it is clear that using too few atoms can lead to poor behaviour, and that more always increases performance; this is not immediately obvious as we may have expected to saturate the network capacity. The difference in performance between the 51-atom version and DQN is particularly striking: the latter is outperformed in all five games, and in Seaquest we attain state-of-the-art performance. As an additional point of the comparison, the single-parameter Bernoulli algorithm performs better than DQN in 3 games out of 5, and is most notably more robust in Asterix.
items.zh: 我们首先研究了算法在训练游戏上的性能与原子数量的关系（图 3）。在此实验中，我们设置 ε=0.05。从数据中可以清楚地看出，使用过少的原子会导致不良行为，而更多的原子总能提高性能；这一点并非显而易见，因为我们可能预期网络容量会饱和。51 原子版本与 DQN 之间的性能差异尤为显著：后者在所有五个游戏中均被超越，在 Seaquest 中我们达到了最先进的性能。作为额外的比较点，单参数伯努利算法在 5 个游戏中的 3 个中优于 DQN，并且在 Asterix 中最为稳健。

items.en: One interesting outcome of this experiment was to find out that our method does pick up on stochasticity. Pong exhibits intrinsic randomness: the exact timing of the reward depends on internal registers and is truly unobservable. We see this clearly reflected in the agent’s prediction (Figure 5): over five consecutive frames, the value distribution shows two modes indicating the agent’s belief that it has yet to receive a reward. Interestingly, since the agent’s state does not include past rewards, it cannot even extinguish the prediction after receiving the reward, explaining the relative proportions of the modes.
items.zh: 该实验的一个有趣结果是发现我们的方法确实捕捉到了随机性。Pong 表现出内在随机性：奖励的确切时间取决于内部寄存器，且真正不可观测。我们在智能体的预测中清楚地看到了这一点（图 5）：在连续五帧中，价值分布显示出两个模式，表明智能体认为它尚未收到奖励。有趣的是，由于智能体的状态不包括过去的奖励，它在收到奖励后甚至无法消除该预测，这解释了模式的相对比例。

items.capZh: 图 5：Pong 中的内在随机性。

items.en: The performance of the 51-atom agent (from here onwards, C51) on the training games, presented in the last section, is particularly remarkable given that it involved none of the other algorithmic ideas present in state-of-the-art agents. We next asked whether incorporating the most common hyperparameter choice, namely a smaller training ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, could lead to even better results. Specifically, we set ϵ=0.01italic-ϵ0.01\epsilon=0.01 (instead of 0.050.050.05); furthermore, every 1 million frames, we evaluate our agent’s performance with ϵ=0.001italic-ϵ0.001\epsilon=0.001.
items.zh: 上一节中介绍的 51 原子智能体（此后称为 C51）在训练游戏上的性能尤其引人注目，因为它没有涉及最先进智能体中的任何其他算法思想。接下来我们询问，加入最常见的超参数选择，即较小的训练 ε，是否能带来更好的结果。具体来说，我们设置 ε=0.01（而不是 0.05）；此外，每 100 万帧，我们以 ε=0.001 评估智能体的性能。

items.en: We compare our algorithm to DQN (ϵ=0.01italic-ϵ0.01\epsilon=0.01), Double DQN (van Hasselt et al., 2016), the Dueling architecture (Wang et al., 2016), and Prioritized Replay (Schaul et al., 2016), comparing the best evaluation score achieved during training. We see that C51 significantly outperforms these other algorithms (Figures 6 and 7). In fact, C51 surpasses the current state-of-the-art by a large margin in a number of games, most notably Seaquest. One particularly striking fact is the algorithm’s good performance on sparse reward games, for example Venture and Private Eye. This suggests that value distributions are better able to propagate rarely occurring events. Full results are provided in the appendix.
items.zh: 我们将我们的算法与 DQN（ε=0.01）、Double DQN（van Hasselt 等人，2016）、Dueling 架构（Wang 等人，2016）和 Prioritized Replay（Schaul 等人，2016）进行比较，比较训练期间达到的最佳评估分数。我们看到 C51 显著优于这些其他算法（图 6 和图 7）。事实上，C51 在多个游戏中大幅超越了当前最先进水平，尤其是 Seaquest。一个特别引人注目的事实是该算法在稀疏奖励游戏（例如 Venture 和 Private Eye）上的良好性能。这表明价值分布能够更好地传播罕见事件。完整结果见附录。

items.en: We also include in the appendix (Figure 12) a comparison, averaged over 3 seeds, showing the number of games in which C51’s training performance outperforms fully-trained DQN and human players. These results continue to show dramatic improvements, and are more representative of an agent’s average performance. Within 50 million frames, C51 has outperformed a fully trained DQN agent on 45 out of 57 games. This suggests that the full 200 million training frames, and its ensuing computational cost, are unnecessary for evaluating reinforcement learning algorithms within the ALE.
items.zh: 我们还在附录（图 12）中提供了平均超过 3 个种子的比较，显示了 C51 的训练性能优于完全训练的 DQN 和人类玩家的游戏数量。这些结果继续显示出显著的改进，并且更能代表智能体的平均性能。在 5000 万帧内，C51 在 57 个游戏中的 45 个中优于完全训练的 DQN 智能体。这表明完整的 2 亿训练帧及其随之而来的计算成本对于在 ALE 中评估强化学习算法是不必要的。

items.en: The most recent version of the ALE contains a stochastic execution mechanism designed to ward against trajectory overfitting.Specifically, on each frame the environment rejects the agent’s selected action with probability p=0.25𝑝0.25p=0.25. Although DQN is mostly robust to stochastic execution, there are a few games in which its performance is reduced. On a score scale normalized with respect to the random and DQN agents, C51 obtains mean and median score improvements of 126%percent126126\% and 21.5%percent21.521.5\% respectively, confirming the benefits of C51 beyond the deterministic setting.
items.zh: 最新版本的 ALE 包含一个随机执行机制，旨在防止轨迹过拟合。具体来说，在每一帧上，环境以概率 p=0.25 拒绝智能体选择的动作。尽管 DQN 对随机执行大多具有鲁棒性，但在少数游戏中其性能会下降。在与随机智能体和 DQN 智能体归一化的分数尺度上，C51 的平均和中位数分数改进分别为 126% 和 21.5%，证实了 C51 在确定性设置之外的益处。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Percentage improvement, per-game, of C51 over Double DQN, computed using van Hasselt et al.’s method.
items.capZh: 图 7：C51 相对于 Double DQN 的每游戏改进百分比，使用 van Hasselt 等人的方法计算。

items.en: In this work we sought a more complete picture of reinforcement learning, one that involves value distributions. We found that learning value distributions is a powerful notion that allows us to surpass most gains previously made on Atari 2600, without further algorithmic adjustments.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们寻求更完整的强化学习图景，其中涉及价值分布。我们发现学习价值分布是一个强大的概念，使我们能够超越之前在 Atari 2600 上取得的大部分进展，而无需进一步的算法调整。

full.sec: 6.1 Why does learning a distribution matter?
full.secZh: 6.1 为什么学习分布很重要？

items.en: It is surprising that, when we use a policy which aims to maximize expected return, we should see any difference in performance. The distinction we wish to make is that learning distributions matters in the presence of approximation. We now outline some possible reasons.
items.zh: 令人惊讶的是，当我们使用旨在最大化期望回报的策略时，性能上会出现任何差异。我们想指出的区别在于，在存在近似的情况下，学习分布很重要。我们现在概述一些可能的原因。

items.en: Reduced chattering. Our results from Section 3.4 highlighted a significant instability in the Bellman optimality operator. When combined with function approximation, this instability may prevent the policy from converging, what Gordon (1995) called chattering. We believe the gradient-based categorical algorithm is able to mitigate these effects by effectively averaging the different distributions, similar to conservative policy iteration (Kakade & Langford, 2002). While the chattering persists, it is integrated to the approximate solution.
items.zh: 减少抖动。我们在第 3.4 节的结果突出了贝尔曼最优算子中的显著不稳定性。当与函数近似结合时，这种不稳定性可能阻止策略收敛，Gordon（1995）称之为抖动。我们相信基于梯度的分类算法能够通过有效平均不同分布来减轻这些影响，类似于保守策略迭代（Kakade & Langford, 2002）。虽然抖动仍然存在，但它被整合到近似解中。

items.en: State aliasing. Even in a deterministic environment, state aliasing may result in effective stochasticity. McCallum (1995), for example, showed the importance of coupling representation learning with policy learning in partially observable domains. We saw an example of state aliasing in Pong, where the agent could not exactly predict the reward timing. Again, by explicitly modelling the resulting distribution we provide a more stable learning target.
items.zh: 状态混叠。即使在确定性环境中，状态混叠也可能导致有效的随机性。例如，McCallum（1995）展示了在部分可观测域中将表示学习与策略学习相结合的重要性。我们在 Pong 中看到了状态混叠的一个例子，其中智能体无法精确预测奖励时间。同样，通过显式建模结果分布，我们提供了更稳定的学习目标。

items.en: A richer set of predictions. A recurring theme in artificial intelligence is the idea of an agent learning from a multitude of predictions (Caruana 1997; Utgoff & Stracuzzi 2002; Sutton et al. 2011; Jaderberg et al. 2017). The distributional approach naturally provides us with a rich set of auxiliary predictions, namely: the probability that the return will take on a particular value. Unlike previously proposed approaches, however, the accuracy of these predictions is tightly coupled with the agent’s performance.
items.zh: 更丰富的预测集。人工智能中一个反复出现的主题是智能体从多种预测中学习的思想（Caruana 1997; Utgoff & Stracuzzi 2002; Sutton 等人 2011; Jaderberg 等人 2017）。分布方法自然为我们提供了丰富的辅助预测集，即：回报取特定值的概率。然而，与先前提出的方法不同，这些预测的准确性与智能体的性能紧密耦合。

items.en: Framework for inductive bias. The distributional perspective on reinforcement learning allows a more natural framework within which we can impose assumptions about the domain or the learning problem itself. In this work we used distributions with support bounded in [Vmin,Vmax]subscript𝑉minsubscript𝑉max[V_{\textsc{min}},V_{\textsc{max}}]. Treating this support as a hyperparameter allows us to change the optimization problem by treating all extremal returns (e.g. greater than Vmaxsubscript𝑉maxV_{\textsc{max}}) as equivalent. Surprisingly, a similar value clipping in DQN significantly degrades performance in most games. To take another example: interpreting the discount factor γ𝛾\gamma as a proper probability, as some authors have argued, leads to a different algorithm.
items.zh: 归纳偏置的框架。关于强化学习的分布视角允许一个更自然的框架，在该框架内我们可以对领域或学习问题本身施加假设。在这项工作中，我们使用了支持在 [Vmin, Vmax] 内有界的分布。将此支持视为超参数允许我们通过将所有极端回报（例如大于 Vmax）视为等价来改变优化问题。令人惊讶的是，DQN 中类似的值裁剪在大多数游戏中显著降低了性能。再举一个例子：将折扣因子 γ 解释为适当的概率，正如一些作者所主张的，会导致不同的算法。

items.en: Well-behaved optimization. It is well-accepted that the KL divergence between categorical distributions is a reasonably easy loss to minimize. This may explain some of our empirical performance. Yet early experiments with alternative losses, such as KL divergence between continuous densities, were not fruitful, in part because the KL divergence is insensitive to the values of its outcomes. A closer minimization of the Wasserstein metric should yield even better results than what we presented here.
items.zh: 良好行为的优化。人们普遍认为，分类分布之间的 KL 散度是一个相当容易最小化的损失。这可能解释了我们的一些经验性能。然而，早期使用替代损失（例如连续密度之间的 KL 散度）的实验并不成功，部分原因是 KL 散度对其结果的值不敏感。更接近地最小化 Wasserstein 度量应该会产生比我们这里展示的更好的结果。

items.en: In closing, we believe our results highlight the need to account for distribution in the design, theoretical or otherwise, of algorithms.
items.zh: 最后，我们相信我们的结果强调了在设计算法时（无论是理论上还是其他方面）考虑分布的必要性。

items.en: The camera-ready copy of this paper incorrectly reported a mean score of 1010% for C51. The corrected figure stands at 701%, which remains higher than the other comparable baselines. The median score remains unchanged at 178%.
items.zh: 本文的最终印刷版错误地将C51的平均得分报告为1010%。修正后的数字为701%，仍高于其他可比基线。中位数得分保持不变，仍为178%。

items.en: The error was due to evaluation episodes in one game (Atlantis) lasting over 30 minutes; in comparison, the other results presented here cap episodes at 30 minutes, as is standard. The previously reported score on Atlantis was 3.7 million; our 30-minute score is 841,075, which we believe is close to the achievable maximum in this time frame. Capping at 30 minutes brings our human-normalized score on Atlantis from 22824% to a mere (!) 5199%, unfortunately enough to noticeably affect the mean score, whose sensitivity to outliers is well-documented.
items.zh: 该错误是由于一个游戏（Atlantis）中的评估回合持续超过30分钟；相比之下，本文呈现的其他结果均按标准将回合上限设为30分钟。先前报告的Atlantis得分为370万；我们30分钟内的得分为841,075，我们认为这接近该时间范围内可达到的最大值。将上限设为30分钟后，我们在Atlantis上的人类标准化得分从22824%降至（仅）5199%，不幸地足以显著影响平均得分，而平均得分对异常值的敏感性已有充分记录。
